name: patternguard
description: Guard AI-agent code changes against pattern drift: plan the blast radius, execute within bounds, and review sibling consistency before committing.

interface.shortDescription: Guard agent code changes against pattern drift
interface.longDescription: Three coordinated skills for codebases operated by AI agents and subagents. patternguard-planner maps every file a change touches, ensures .patternguard/ exists, records duplicated patterns, marks template candidates only when repetition justifies it, promotes them to template mode only when a generator command already exists, and respects the workflow lock. patternguard-executor acquires the workflow lock, invokes the planner when no index exists or drift is detected, then applies changes through Solo, Orchestrator, or Subagent execution. Candidate-only patterns stay duplicated, while template-backed patterns regenerate only when both template and generator.command are present. patternguard-reviewer verifies correctness, sibling consistency, index conformance, generated-file integrity, and PatternGuard headers after changes, producing approved, changes-needed, or ESCALATE verdicts. It escalates when retry_count reaches 3 or the issue cannot be fixed by execution alone. Works on both greenfield and existing projects.
defaultPrompt: Use patternguard-planner to map the structure for a new feature
Use patternguard-executor to apply a change across all affected routes
Use patternguard-reviewer to verify changes before committing
